scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/ai/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: bun run build && (cd packages/core && bun publish) && (cd packages/server && bun publish) && (cd packages/react && bun publish) && (cd packages/ai && bun publish)
